      "text": "Ir tee Dedsaimo-Uppuri

GA Namma gattaws.
"

      "n": 36,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un Iſkijus un wiſſi Lau-
dis preezajahß vaht to/ ka Deewṣ
teein Laudim to bij padarrijs/ jo
ſchi Leeta notikke ahtri.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 1,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Ta XXX. Nodalla.

deenas,Swehtkus Jerufaleme turreht:
Ras arridjan ar leelu Godibu un Preelu
tohp turreti :14/ 26.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 1,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Behz juhttija Iſkijus pee
Bwiſſu Ifraetu un Juḥ-
du/ un rakſtija arridsan
us Gewraimu un Manaſſu/ ka
teein bij ta KUNGA Namma
nahkt us Jerufalemi/ ka tee tam
KUNGAM Ifraeta Deewam
tohs Paſſa-Swehtkus turretu.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 2,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Jo tas Kehniſsch bij Pa-

Kungeem un wiſſu Draudſibu
Jerufaleme/ ka tee tohs Paſſa-
Swehtkus ohtrâ Mehneſi tur-
retu.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 3,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Jo tai ibſtena Paſſa tee to
ne warreja turret/ tapehz ka tee
Pre-eſtexi ne btj papillam fweh-
tiſchees/ un tee Laudis Jerufa-
lemê ne btj kaputzejſchees.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 4,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un ichi Leeta vatikke tam
Kehniſſam un wiſſai Draudſibai.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 5,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un tee patwehleja/ ka

nat/ ka tee nahktu/ tam Ri
GAM Ifraeta Deewam
Paſſa-Swehtkus turreht
ſalemê/ jo tee to fenn ne bij
rejſchi/ ittin ka rakſtihts bij
"
    },
    {
      "n": 6,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Tad nogahje tee Tezz

fees pee teem Isglabbteeni/
jums irr atlikkuſchi no to A-
xu Kehniſu Rohkas.
"

    {
      "n": 7,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un ne effeet ta ka j

nodewis/ ittin ka juhs pe
redsat.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 8,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Nu tad ne effeet paht
wtgi/ ittin ka juhsu Tehwi/

ța/ fo wiſſch irr fivehtijs u
ſchtgi/ un kalpojeet tam Ki
GAM juhsu Deewam/ tad
na bahrga Duſnitba no j
nowehrſichees.
"

      "n": 9,
